display.purpose: Landing hero headline only. Capped under 6rem; text-wrap balance.

headline.purpose: Workspace page titles and major section heads.

body.purpose: Default reading text in Ink Soft; measure capped 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, metadata, footers.

mono.purpose: SQL, ChartSpec JSON, IDs, dataset/source-model badges, raw cells.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Optional hairline lift on primary cards; many cards use border alone.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Drawers, modals, command surfaces over a scrim.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for transitions and entrances. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, button, input state changes.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Drawer/modal slide-ins, tab and stage transitions.

motion.name: stagger-step
motion.purpose: Per-item delay for staggered list/card reveals (history, dashboard cards).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per view (Launch Demo, Upload, Use Demo Dataset, Generate).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; background: #4f46e5; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4338ca; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #334155; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 17px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f8fafc; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal text/icon action for low-emphasis controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #334155; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f1f5f9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f46e5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field; placeholder kept at body contrast, not faint gray.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Ask the AI Analytics Engineer…" />
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(79,70,229,0.35); }

components.name: Status Badge (Ready)
components.description: Pill status badge; color always paired with icon + label. Swap hue/icon per status (running/review/failed/waiting).
components.html: Ready
components.css: .ds-badge-ready { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #047857; background: #d1fae5; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; }

components.name: Dataset Badge
components.description: Mono provenance badge; mandatory on every dashboard card and history item.
components.css: .ds-badge-dataset { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; background: #f1f5f9; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Persistent dark slate workspace sidebar; active item raised + white text + indigo marker dot.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #cbd5e1; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1e293b; color: #f8fafc; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #1e293b; color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(99,102,241,0.7); }

components.name: Dashboard Chart Card
components.description: Evidence-forward chart card: title, chart, insight, badges visible; depth collapsed.
components.html:
Revenue by Region

raw_retail_demo
[ chart ]

North region drove 38% of Q3 revenue, up from 29%.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin: 0; } .ds-card-chart { height: 160px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #94a3b8; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; } .ds-card-insight { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #334155; margin: 12px 0 8px; } .ds-card-disclose { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #4f46e5; background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Pipeline Stage (Signature)
components.description: Data Flow preparation-rail stage: name + status color + icon + state label. The literal 'Glass Pipeline'.
components.css: .ds-stage { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; } .ds-stage-name { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0f172a; flex: 1; } .ds-stage-state { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-stage-dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-stage--running .ds-stage-dot { background: #2563eb; animation: ds-pulse 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1) infinite; } .ds-stage--running .ds-stage-state { color: #1d4ed8; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(37,99,235,0.5); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(37,99,235,0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-stage--running .ds-stage-dot { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: MeshFlow is a pipeline you can see through. Raw data enters, moves stage by stage, and out comes a validated chart with its evidence attached. The visual system exists to make that movement legible: where the data is, what happened to it, and why you should trust the result. Transparency is the aesthetic; nothing important is hidden behind magic, only collapsed one click from view. A calm dark slate console frames bright white content cards where data and charts read with maximum clarity. Indigo is the single voice of intent; a disciplined functional palette carries status everywhere, always with an icon or label.
keyCharacteristics: Dark slate console shell; bright white/slate-50 content surfaces.
Indigo as the one accent of intent; a functional status palette for everything else.
Evidence-forward: primary facts visible, depth (SQL, ChartSpec, lineage) collapsed one click away.
Compact and maintainable - restraint is the feature.
Status legible by icon + label + color, never color alone.

rules.name: The One Intent Rule
rules.body: Indigo means intent: active, selected, AI, primary action. It appears on a small fraction of any screen. If half the screen is indigo, none of it reads as the action.

rules.name: The Identity-Only Gradient Rule
rules.body: The cyan-to-violet brand gradient and the warm core are identity materials - logo, landing hero, decorative pipeline glow. They are forbidden on buttons, cards, badges, status, and body chrome. The product theme is indigo + slate, never a blue/cyan/teal wash.

rules.name: The Status-Never-Alone Rule
rules.body: Every status color ships with an icon and/or text label. Color-blind users must read state without the hue.

rules.name: The Evidence-in-Mono Rule
rules.body: If it is data, an identifier, or code, it is set in mono. This separates what the system says (sans) from what the data is (mono).

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No tiny tracked-uppercase kicker above sections. Hierarchy comes from size and weight.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow is a response to state (hover, focus) or layer (floating over content), never default decoration.

dos: Do keep the shell dark slate and content on white / slate-50; indigo is the only accent of intent.
Do show primary facts on cards and collapse depth (SQL, ChartSpec JSON, provider chain, lineage, grain, warehouse/dbt details, raw rows) behind disclosure.
Do pair every status color with an icon and label.
Do put a dataset badge and source-model badge on every dashboard card and history item.
Do design honest empty / setup-required / failure states as first-class screens.
Do render charts with Recharts in Tailwind/shadcn-style cards (KPI, Line, Bar, Horizontal Bar, Table).
Do cap body measure at 65-75ch and keep body text in Ink Soft for 4.5:1 contrast.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
donts: Don't show any fake success: no fake dataset, chart data, insight, fallback dashboard, or generated suggestions.
Don't make it feel like upload CSV -> ask chatbot -> random chart.
Don't use Plotly as the main renderer.
Don't use a blue/cyan/teal-only theme, or let the brand gradient / warm core leak into UI chrome.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as default, or a cream/sand/parchment body background.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't add tracked-uppercase eyebrows or 01/02/03 numbered markers above every section.
Don't nest cards, or repeat identical icon+heading+text card grids.
Don't create primary pages for AI Analytics Engineer, Dashboard list/edit, Pipeline, Lineage Explorer, Snowflake Readiness, dbt Artifacts, or Analysis Detail.
Don't show Analysis Outputs or Dashboard as steps in the preparation status rail.
